fields.label: Phone Number / Group JID
fields.description: Must match the phone_number value returned by the API exactly (e.g. 120363408393794845@g.us).

fields.label: Label
fields.description: Optional — for readability (e.g. the group name).

fields.label: Member Count
fields.description: Messages to this number are multiplied by this count when billing. Leave at 1 for individual contacts.
